title: Kyros Is Turned Into a Toy
description: Pages 16–17 focus on kyros is turned into a toy, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Dressrosa Citizens, Franky, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as kyros's past, King Riku's rule, and Rebecca's family history reveal what Doflamingo stole from Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They won't even be able to reach the under- ground....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: At the base of the king's plateau.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: So, should we enter the "palace," we may proceed to the "toy house" and the "Factory"?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They're all connected on the inside.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But I still cannot believe there exists a person so small!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The following information

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Kin'Emon

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: You're like a toy!! Dwarves are so cool!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ZORO

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: In frog

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: In CAT

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Luffy

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The truth is, we only ever reveal our- selves to big humans who are members of the Royal Family, but...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The straw- hat crew usolanders are except- Tions!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: uso... lander...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The captain's group's "SOP strategy" has already begun.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Look!! Up ahead!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: It's the lift that goes up to the Palace!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We have to show the guard riding that lift an entry permit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Why not just Kick His ass!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: That would cause a scene, and more foes would be sure to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Hmm? Some- one's there!? Is it another enemy!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: You're Strawhat Luffy, aren't you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Eh!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I've been waiting!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: I'll let you into the Palace!!

summary: Kyros Is Turned Into a Toy focuses on Unknown person #1, Dressrosa Citizens, Franky, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as kyros's past, King Riku's rule, and Rebecca's family history reveal what Doflamingo stole from Dressrosa.
